principle: Use real CSP-S past problems as blind probes before trusting historical Luogu weakness labels.

items.title: 员工招聘
expectedOutput: Before coding: write model, constraints, partial-score routes, and implementation risks.
After attempt: record score, time, submissions, whether it was blind, and exact failure stage.
items.reason: 先用 T3/T4 真题盲测验证 PARTIAL_SCORE.SUBTASK_ANALYSIS，候选：2019T3P5659, 2019T4P5664, 2020T3P7077。未盲测前不要把它当成已确认短板。
